description: a resolved brand returns its contact rows
assertions: account resolves to the Hearthline record
contacts includes the primary and any secondary contacts with name, role, email

description: a person hint filters to the matching contact, email verbatim
assertions: exactly the Marcus Webb row is returned
the email is the verbatim address from the record

description: a person hint that matches nobody gaps, never guesses
assertions: a gap names the contacts that are on the account
no contact the hint did not match is returned (no-fabrication)

description: an ambiguous brand returns no contacts, only the resolver candidates
assertions: account is null and contacts is empty
candidates lists the brands the phrase could mean
the caller is directed to disambiguate before reading contacts
